dc_description: A daytime street scene shows a tractor driving away from the camera on a paved road. The tractor has large rear tires and is pulling an orange metal trailer or utility frame. A person in a striped shirt is seated on the tractor. The road curves slightly through an area lined with tall trees, lampposts, grass, and low stone edging. The sky is clear and blue, with buildings and parked vehicles visible farther down the road on the right.
novel_visual_observations: The tractor is traveling near the center-right of the lane, while its orange trailer extends slightly to the right side.
A tall, narrow tree trunk stands close to the roadway and rises prominently near the center of the image.
rich_context: Strada Provinciale Ponte Rotto, Fontevivola, Sutri, Viterbo, Lazio, 01015, Italia
